# Zendale Limited

> Zendale Limited is an integrated healthcare group. Behind one name sits a
> coordinated network of specialist facilities, a consulting practice, a medical
> technology division and a corporate health team, so that a patient, an
> employer, a hospital, an HMO or a public institution can reach the right care,
> expertise or infrastructure through a single partner.

Positioning: One Partner. Complete Healthcare Solutions.
Site: https://www.zendalelimited.com
Language: English
Region served: Nigeria
Head office: 42 Oduduwa Crescent, Ikeja GRA, Lagos, Nigeria
Telephone / WhatsApp: +234 906 182 9702
General enquiries: info@zendalelimited.com
Partnership enquiries: partnerships@zendalelimited.com

## Five capability pillars

- Clinical & Specialist Care — clinical delivery through the specialist facility network.
- Corporate Healthcare — health programmes and cover designed for employers and their staff.
- Medical Technology — biomedical engineering, equipment supply, installation and support.
- Healthcare Consulting — helping healthcare organisations improve, expand and transform.
- Healthcare Partnerships — structured collaboration with hospitals, HMOs, institutions and agencies.

## The network

- Sky High Medical Centre — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/sky-high
- Sky High ICU / Dialysis Centre — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/sky-high-icu
- Finnih Medical Centre — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/finnih
- LifeCentre Medical Services — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/lifecentre
- Kindred Path Fertility Centre — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/kindred-path
- Zendale Endoscopy Centre — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/zendale-endoscopy
- LifeCentre Med Support — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/lifecentre-support
- VHELAR Consulting — https://www.zendalelimited.com/network/vhelar

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.zendalelimited.com/): the group proposition and the five pillars.
- [Who We Are](https://www.zendalelimited.com/about): the group's story, philosophy and structure.
- [Healthcare Network](https://www.zendalelimited.com/network): every facility in the network and what it does.
- [Services](https://www.zendalelimited.com/services): the full service catalogue across all pillars.
- [Corporate Healthcare](https://www.zendalelimited.com/corporate-health): employer health programmes.
- [Healthcare Consulting](https://www.zendalelimited.com/consulting): advisory for healthcare organisations.
- [Medical Technology](https://www.zendalelimited.com/medical-technology): biomedical engineering and equipment.
- [Partnerships](https://www.zendalelimited.com/partnerships): six partnership pathways for organisations.
- [How We Work](https://www.zendalelimited.com/how-we-work): the engagement sequence, stage by stage.
- [Success Stories](https://www.zendalelimited.com/case-studies): challenge, approach and outcome write-ups.
- [Resource Centre](https://www.zendalelimited.com/resources): articles and insights for healthcare decision-makers.
- [Download Centre](https://www.zendalelimited.com/downloads): guides written for professional audiences.
- [Careers](https://www.zendalelimited.com/careers): working inside the group.
- [Contact](https://www.zendalelimited.com/contact): start a conversation with the team.
- [Privacy & Compliance](https://www.zendalelimited.com/privacy): how the group handles data.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.zendalelimited.com/sitemap.xml): every indexable URL on the site.
